_description: Schema-vs-validator coverage map (AC-GH63-15 / M5). Rule ids are extracted from schemas/*.schema.json (structural keywords + x-coverage-rules). Each rule must map to >=1 fixture under tools/.tests/fixtures/ that exercises it, or be listed in 'na' with rationale. This file is the non-tautological assertion: adding a schema rule without a map entry fails --coverage. Reviewer iteration-1 #2 strengthened the check: for every pattern/enum rule the check REQUIRES a rejecting (negative/) fixture and PROVES rejection by running the validator binary (positive->exit 0, negative->exit!=0) instead of checking mere file presence.
_convention: positive fixtures pass (exit 0); negative fixtures fail (exit 1) except heuristic-only ones (exit 0 + WARN); planning-summary fixtures exercised via --summary. For pattern/enum rules at least one mapped fixture MUST live under negative/ and is enforcement-proven (the validator is actually run on it).

na.top.enum.decision_area: declarative-only enum; documented by the schema for IDE/docs but NOT enforced by the stdlib validator (out of GH-63 in-scope negative cases, SD-2/NG-5). Enforcement deferred to a future change if required.
na.top.enum.decision_scope: declarative-only enum; documented by the schema for IDE/docs but NOT enforced by the stdlib validator (out of GH-63 in-scope negative cases, SD-2/NG-5).
na.top.enum.reversibility: declarative-only enum; documented by the schema for IDE/docs but NOT enforced by the stdlib validator (out of GH-63 in-scope negative cases, SD-2/NG-5).
na.nested.enum.classification.archetype: declarative-only classification enum; documented by the schema but NOT validator-enforced (only classification.rigor is enforced). SD-2/NG-5.

na.nested.enum.classification.blast_radius: declarative-only classification enum; documented by the schema but NOT validator-enforced (only classification.rigor is enforced). SD-2/NG-5.
na.nested.enum.classification.recurrence: declarative-only classification enum; documented by the schema but NOT validator-enforced (only classification.rigor is enforced). SD-2/NG-5.
na.top.pattern.decision_id: declarative-only pattern (planning summary); the --summary validator checks decision_type enum + required fields + disjointness but does not pattern-check decision_id. SD-3/NG-5.
